messages.content:
Now applying the skill mapping rules to all 11 rows of the CSV. Here is the result:

---

📋 **Column Mapping Summary**
──────────────────────────────────────────
CSV Column → Provider Field
──────────────────────────────────────────
`EmployeeId` → `id`
`EmployeeCode` → `providerCode`
`FirstName` → `firstName`
`LastName` → `lastName`
`MobilePhone` → `phone`
`EmployeeTypeName` → `role`
`STATUS` → `isActive` (Yes → true, No → false)
`IsConsultant` → `isConsultant`
`NickName` → `nickName`
`IsOnlineBookingEnabled` → `onlineBookingEnabled`
──────────────────────────────────────────
**Ignored columns:** `MobileCountryCode` (no Provider field equivalent), `CenterName` (no Provider field equivalent)
**Records processed:** 11
**Validation warnings:** None

---

Now saving all 11 records to Cosmos DB:



---

✅ **11 Provider record(s) saved to Cosmos DB successfully.**

Here's a full breakdown of what was imported:

| # | Name | Code | Role | Phone | Online Booking | Active |
|---|------|------|------|-------|---------------|--------|
| 1 | Atul Kakar | PAR001 | OWNER | (848) 667-4835 | ✅ | ✅ |
| 2 | Bay 2 *(Nick: Bay 2)* | PAR006 | Instructor | — | ✅ | ✅ |
| 3 | Bay 3 *(Nick: Bay 3)* | PAR007 | Instructor | — | ✅ | ✅ |
| 4 | Bay 4 *(Nick: Bay 4)* | PAR008 | Instructor | — | ✅ | ✅ |
| 5 | Bay 5 | Bay5 | Instructor | — | ❌ | ✅ |
| 6 | Executive Lounge *(Nick: Executive Lounge)* | PAR005 | Instructor | — | ✅ | ✅ |
| 7 | Monty Monticello | PAR009 | Instructor | (609) 731-5463 | ✅ | ✅ |
| 8 | Nick Schiavo | PAR002 | OWNER | (845) 258-0966 | ✅ | ✅ |
| 9 | revolt marketing | MAR1001 | OWNER | (647) 720-6725 | ❌ | ✅ |
| 10 | Sean Kim | PAR010 | Instructor | (917) 208-1860 | ✅ | ✅ |
| 11 | Steven Gatanas | emplo0017 | MANAGER | — | ❌ | ✅ |

**Notes:**
- `STATUS` column (`Yes`) was interpreted as `isActive: true` for all 11 records — no inactive providers in this batch.
- `CenterName` (New Brunswick) and `MobileCountryCode` (US/CA) were ignored as they have no matching Provider fields.
- No email addresses were present in the CSV — all `email` fields set to `null`.
- `isConsultant` was `False` for all records per the source data.

traceEvents.toolResult:
{
  "type": "thought",
  "step": 1,
  "plugin": "csv-provider-mapper",
  "plugin_type": "skill",
  "reasoning": "I need to load the csv-provider-mapper skill first to understand the mapping rules, Provider schema, and validation logic before processing the CSV data.",
  "expected_outcome": "Full skill instructions including Provider field definitions, mapping logic, and validation defaults.",
  "status": "success"
}

{
  "type": "reflection",
  "step": 1,
  "plugin": "csv-provider-mapper",
  "plugin_type": "skill",
  "result_summary": "Skill loaded successfully. Provider schema defined with all field mappings, transformation rules, boolean handling, UUID generation logic, and validation requirements.",
  "insight": "I now have everything I need to map the CSV columns to Provider fields. I can apply the mapping directly — no script to run. I'll now process the 11 CSV rows and produce the JSON array.",
  "status": "success"
}

{
  "type": "thought",
  "step": 2,
  "plugin": "csv-provider-mapper",
  "plugin_type": "skill",
  "reasoning": "Applying the skill's mapping rules to the uploaded CSV. Column names like EmployeeId→id, EmployeeCode→providerCode, FirstName→firstName, LastName→lastName, MobilePhone→phone, EmployeeTypeName→role, STATUS→isActive, IsConsultant→isConsultant, NickName→nickName, IsOnlineBookingEnabled→onlineBookingEnabled. CenterName and MobileCountryCode have no direct Provider field match.",
  "expected_outcome": "11 fully validated Provider JSON objects ready for Cosmos DB insertion.",
  "status": "success"
}

{
  "type": "thought",
  "step": 3,
  "plugin": "cosmos_create_document",
  "plugin_type": "mcp",
  "reasoning": "The skill has produced 11 Provider JSON objects. I must now call cosmos_create_document once per record. All 11 calls are independent so I will fire them simultaneously.",
  "expected_outcome": "All 11 Provider records persisted in Cosmos DB with auto-generated timestamps and IDs.",
  "status": "success"
}

{
  "type": "reflection",
  "step": 3,
  "plugin": "cosmos_create_document",
  "plugin_type": "mcp",
  "result_summary": "All 11 cosmos_create_document calls returned statusCode 201 — Record created successfully. Each record received a system-generated ID, timestamps (createdon/updatedon), gocameomodel='Provider', and an _etag.",
  "insight": "All 11 Provider records were persisted successfully with no errors. The import is complete.",
  "status": "success"
}
